intro: A handful of things I've built, broken, and come back to.

items.title: a quiet room
items.description: This very place — a hand-built portal for writing and wandering. No framework, no noise, just plain HTML and a little drifting dust.

items.title: untitled, in progress
items.description: Something I'm still shaping in the dark. It'll surface here when it's ready to be seen.

items.title: a small experiment
items.description: Replace me with something real — a tool, a sketch, a thing you love. Each card links out when it's ready.
